# CPTrafficSide.left

**Case**

Indicates the traffic drives on the left side of the roadway.

## Declaration

```swift
case left
```

## Lane statuses

- **CPTrafficSide.right**: Indicates the traffic drives on the right side of the roadway.

items.description: Indicates the traffic drives on the right side of the roadway.
